author: maxine--knowledge-edit
content: Result: Implemented --replace-section and --append-to-section flags for knowledge edit. Added parse_heading(), find_section_range(), replace_section_content(), append_to_section_content() in knowledge.rs. Updated KnowledgeCommands::Edit in main.rs with clap argument group. 13 new unit tests covering: heading parsing, section range finding, replace/append operations, missing heading errors, subsection handling, query with/without hash prefix. All 1359 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean. Commit 688626c.
